title: Quota Leasing Scheme
body: "August 2025 - Quota Leasing Scheme  Offer of underutilised quota to vessels in the non-sector with over 10 metre: Category B, C and no-quota annex licences.  The MMO is opening a window for vessels in the non-sector with over 10 metre: Category B, C and no-quota annex licences to apply for access to underutilised quota. Vessels with these licences have a limited number of quota stocks for which they can fish. Under this scheme, these vessels can apply for access to more opportunities for the remainder of 2025. At this stage, only stocks where the MMO are confident there is excess within the non-sector pools will be released.  The offer means that a small amount of the quota that England receives from the Trade and Cooperation Agreement will be distributed via the MMO to these vessels upon application and depending on availability. It will enable vessels with restricted non-sector licences to fish above their current limits for the leased quota stocks up to and including 31 December 2025.   The latest window closed on the 2nd of September 2025. Please contact inshorequotamanager@marinemanagement.org,uk for further information   Applications must be completed using the form located below. Where there are competing proposals for stocks the MMO will make decisions on applications based on answers provided in the form to economic, social and environmental criteria-based questions.             MMO Quota leasing scheme form 2025    MS Word Document, 61.6 KB       The stocks covered by this initiative are listed below, however other stocks may be considered:     Anglerfish - 7 Plaice - 7d   Anglerfish – North Sea Plaice -7e   Brill - 7 de Skates & Rays – 7d   Brill – North Sea Skates & Rays – North Sea   Cod - 7d Sole – 7d   Cod - 7b-k (excluding d) Sole - North Sea   Haddock - 7b-k Sprats – North Sea   Haddock – North Sea Sprats – 7de   Hake - Western Turbot – North Sea   Lemon Sole – North Sea Whiting – North Sea   Mackerel – North Sea Whiting – 7d   Megrim - 7 Whiting – 7b-k (excluding d)   Plaice – North Sea Witch – North Sea    "
